non_blocking_gaps.title: First real runtime backend remains open
non_blocking_gaps.required_change: Resolve during implementation_architecture or M1 planning, not in this semantic pass.

non_blocking_gaps.title: Executable linter does not yet exist
non_blocking_gaps.required_change: Implement a reusable lint command during M0 once storage layout is chosen.

approved_aspects: The architecture separates logical role identity, runtime process identity, attempts, and worktrees.
The deterministic scheduler boundary is clear enough to prevent a top-level LLM from owning queue mechanics.
Mailbox messages and events have distinct semantic responsibilities.
Authority artifact updates are gated through validation and integration.
A2A is explicitly postponed without preventing a future bridge.
recommended_next_action: Proceed to implementation_architecture after user review.
